title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
NFP June: +57K vs 110K est, prior revised to 129K — weakest in 4 months; UE 4.2%, wages +3.5% YoY
BTC +4.18% (24h) → $61,611; crypto bid on dollar weakness post-NFP
DXY 2-week low ~100.75; Gold $4,137/oz (+0.36%)
Next FOMC Jul 28-29; rate hike trajectory in question after weak jobs print
